summary: Implemented the Export & Share Statistics feature. Added `ShareStatisticsProvider` to generate a high-resolution 1080x1920 Instagram-ready PNG using `Canvas` that replicates the `_GlobalProgressCard` with app branding. Created `StatisticsScreen` with an Amber share icon in the AppBar that triggers the native share menu via `share_plus`. Added strict ARB localization keys for the tooltip and dynamic share message.
